Features, beats, brand deals, bookings, remixes — if it moves the culture, the Bonnet Gang is in. Pitch your idea and let's make some noise together.

Tell us what you've got

Pick a lane, drop the details, and attach your work. From features and beats to brand deals, bookings and remixes — every serious pitch gets read.

We read every pitch. Real ones get a reply.
